name: Crisp Bread and Butter Pickles
recipeInstructions:
1. Peel the onions and thinly slice them.
2. Combine all ingredients in a large bowl or pot.
3. Mix until well blended.
4. Transfer mixture to jars, leaving some headspace at the top.
5. Seal the jars tightly.
6. Allow pickles to cool before storing.
